name: resume-preparation
description: Analyze and improve a resume, LinkedIn profile, and cover letters against job descriptions using a local LLM, with versioned change history.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/scoring/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/llm/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/documents/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/versioning/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ingest/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/analysis/tsconfig.json
